result.stdout:
Contentful.ModelGenerator.Cli v1.0.0

Usage
  contentful-model-generator [command] [options]

  ... generate --api-key <value> --space <value> [options]

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

Commands
  generate          Generates classes representing Content models.

You can run `contentful-model-generator [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

Contentful.ModelGenerator.Cli v1.0.0

Usage
  contentful-model-generator [command] [options]

  ... generate --api-key <value> --space <value> [options]

Options
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

Commands
  generate          Generates classes representing Content models.

You can run `contentful-model-generator [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Description
  Generates classes representing Content models.

Usage
  contentful-model-generator generate --api-key <value> --space <value> [options]

Options
* -a|--api-key      The Contentful API key for the Content Delivery API. 
* -s|--space        The Space ID to fetch content model from. 
  -e|--environment  The Environment to fetch the content model from. Default: "master".
  -n|--namespace    The namespace of the generated classes. Default: "Contentful.ContentModels".
  -p|--path         Path to the directory where the files will be created. Default: ".".
  -f|--force        Overwrite already existing files. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

commands.payload:
Description
  Generates classes representing Content models.

Usage
  contentful-model-generator generate --api-key <value> --space <value> [options]

Options
* -a|--api-key      The Contentful API key for the Content Delivery API. 
* -s|--space        The Space ID to fetch content model from. 
  -e|--environment  The Environment to fetch the content model from. Default: "master".
  -n|--namespace    The namespace of the generated classes. Default: "Contentful.ContentModels".
  -p|--path         Path to the directory where the files will be created. Default: ".".
  -f|--force        Overwrite already existing files. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
